zh.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight於大約1421年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight39歲，母親Benedicta de Ludlow30歲。他於1435年與Margaret de Swynfen在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1450年被列為treasurer of calais。他去世於1467年6月在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight于大约1421年出生在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight39岁，母亲Benedicta de Ludlow30岁。他于1435年与Margaret de Swynfen在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1450年被列为treasurer of calais。他去世于1467年6月在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈登 霍爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight was born about 1421, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, was 39 and his mother, Benedicta de Ludlow, was 30. He married Margaret de Swynfen in 1435, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1450, at the age of 30, his occupation is listed as treasurer of calais. He died in June 1467, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight est né environ 1421, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Benedicta de Ludlow, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Swynfen en 1435, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1450, à l’âge de 30 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est treasurer of calais. Il est décédé en juin 1467, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight um 1421 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight 39 und seine Mutter Benedicta de Ludlow 30. Er hat 1435 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England Margaret de Swynfen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1450, als er 30 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als treasurer of calais aufgeführt. Er starb im Juni 1467 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight è nato il circa 1421 nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Benedicta de Ludlow, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Swynfen nel 1435, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1450, all'età di 30 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come treasurer of calais. Morì nel giugno 1467, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knightが約1421年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knightは39歳，母Benedicta de Ludlowは30歳であった。1435年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルでMargaret de Swynfenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1450年，30歳の時，職業はtreasurer of calaisと記録されている。彼は1467年6月にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで47歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight(이)가 대략 1421년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Benedicta de Ludlow(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1435년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 Margaret de Swynfen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1450년, 30세의 나이로 그의 직업은 treasurer of calais이었다. 그는 1467년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight nasceu aproximadamente 1421, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta de Ludlow, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Swynfen em 1435, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1450, com 30 anos, sua profissão aparece como treasurer of calais. Ele faleceu em junho de 1467, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight родился около 1421 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Ludlow, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Swynfen в 1435 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1450 году, в возрасте 30 лет,  он работал по профессии treasurer of calais. Он умер июнь 1467 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight nació aproximadamente 1421, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Benedicta de Ludlow, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret de Swynfen en 1435, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1450, a la edad de 30 años, su ocupación registrada era treasurer of calais. Murió en junio de 1467, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Shropshire, Inglaterra.
